subtitle: FAQ
title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Find answers to common questions about our services. Can't find what you're looking for? Feel free to contact us directly.

faqs.question: What services does Magnax offer?
faqs.answer: Magnax offers a comprehensive range of IT services including cloud solutions, cybersecurity, data analytics, custom software development, IT consulting, and managed services. We tailor our solutions to meet your specific business needs.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A typical project can range from 4-12 weeks. During our initial consultation, we provide a detailed timeline based on your specific requirements.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 support for all our clients. Our support packages include system monitoring, maintenance, troubleshooting, and regular updates to ensure your systems run smoothly.

faqs.question: What industries do you specialize in?
faqs.answer: We work with clients across various industries including healthcare, finance, retail, manufacturing, and technology. Our diverse experience allows us to bring best practices from different sectors to your project.

faqs.question: How do you ensure data security?
faqs.answer: Security is our top priority. We implement industry-standard security protocols, encryption, regular security audits, and compliance with regulations like GDPR and HIPAA. Our team stays updated with the latest security practices.
